title: helichrysum cerastoides
intro: Helichrysum cerastoides, also known as crested strawflower or rock rose, is a perennial, succulent-like plant with silvery-gray leaves and yellow or orange flowers. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum cerastoides include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include reduced inflammation, improved skin health, and potential protection against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum cerastoides include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
